search.description: The SPL search query to execute

earliest_time.description: Earliest time for the search using relative or absolute time format

exec_mode.description: Execution mode. Normal runs asynchronously, oneshot runs synchronously, blocking waits for completion.

max_count.description: Maximum number of results to return

max_time.description: Maximum time in seconds before the search is finalized

timeout.description: Number of seconds to keep the search after processing has stopped

rf.description: Comma-separated list of required fields to include in results

id.description: Optional custom search ID. If not specified, Splunk generates one automatically.

status_buckets.description: Number of status buckets to generate for the search timeline. Set to a value greater than 0 to enable timeline.

auto_cancel.description: Seconds of inactivity after which the search is automatically cancelled. 0 means never auto-cancel.

auto_finalize_ec.description: Auto-finalize the search after this number of events have been processed. 0 disables auto-finalize.

auto_pause.description: Seconds of inactivity after which the search is automatically paused. 0 means never auto-pause.

enable_lookups.description: Whether to enable lookups during the search

reload_macros.description: Whether to reload macro definitions before the search

reduce_freq.description: How frequently to invoke the reduce phase (seconds)

spawn_process.description: Whether to run the search in a separate process
